DataSourceMeta.description: Provenance header carried by every standalone data-source document.

title.description: Document title (e.g. 'JPITL for OP IRON STRIKE').
title.title: Title

classification.description: Classification level of this data source.

anyOf.description: Military date-time group in DDHHMMZMONYY form (e.g. '181200ZAPR26').

as_of_dtg.description: Date-time group the data was current as of.

DataSourceMeta.title: DataSourceMeta

JPITLEntry.description:
One row on the Joint Prioritized Integrated Target List (JPITL) per JP 3-60 / ATP 3-60.

The JPITL is the JFC-approved, prioritized, integrated target list across
all joint force components. Each row carries approval state, engagement
means, and commander's effect guidance. TST entries live on a separate
list (:class:`TSTEntry`) because their authority and timeline differ.

target_number.description: Target identifier — basic-encyclopedia number (e.g. 'BE-0042-01') or locally assigned 'TGT 0042'.
target_number.title: Target Number

priority_rank.description: Rank-ordered priority on the JPITL (1 = highest).
priority_rank.title: Priority Rank

target_name.description: Short target name (e.g. 'ENY MRC CP, OBJ HAMMER').
target_name.title: Target Name

target_description.description: Narrative target description: what the target is and why it matters.
target_description.title: Target Description

category.description: Warfighting-function category; superset of HVT categories to include joint-level targets.
category.title: Category

location.description: Target MGRS grid — point location at time of approval; update on dynamic re-tasking.
location.title: Location

component_tasked.description: Joint force component assigned to prosecute this target.
component_tasked.title: Component Tasked

desired_effect.description: Commander's desired effect on the target.
desired_effect.title: Desired Effect

authorized_engagement_means.description: Delivery systems cleared to engage (e.g. 'M777', 'HIMARS', 'F-16 CAS', 'Cyber').
authorized_engagement_means.title: Authorized Engagement Means

engagement_guidance.description: Commander's intent / restrictions for engaging this target.
engagement_guidance.title: Engagement Guidance

cde_level.description: CDE level determined during targeting-approval board.
cde_level.title: Cde Level

approval_authority.description: Authority that approved this target (e.g. 'JFC', 'JTCB', 'Component Cdr', 'BN CDR').
approval_authority.title: Approval Authority

no_strike_crossref.description: No-Strike List / Restricted Target List entry this target was deconflicted against.
no_strike_crossref.title: No Strike Crossref

roe_constraints.description: Explicit ROE or LOAC constraints beyond baseline guidance.
roe_constraints.title: Roe Constraints

anyOf.description: Military date-time group in DDHHMMZMONYY form (e.g. '181200ZAPR26').

review_dtg.description: DTG the approval expires and must be re-validated (target cycle review point).
review_dtg.title: Review Dtg

linked_hvt_rank.description: Optional cross-reference to an HVT/HPTL priority_rank for traceability.
linked_hvt_rank.title: Linked Hvt Rank

JPITLEntry.title: JPITLEntry
